title: Lilith and Her Mask
wikitext:
[]: Lilith & Her Mask             Quote Post by conchappie » Thu Sep 11, 2008 4:58 am i don't know if this has been brought up before. but some people have stated that Lilith has a new mask but i'm not sure it is a mask. i think that this is her face similar to the faces of the other angels. see the examples given and let me know what you think I thought of this while reading the thread about the moon giant having Lilith original mask and how seele may give the same mask to any of its little angles it finds or whatever sorry if this has already been covered before. What do you guys think? I'd say its her face.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Thu Sep 11, 2008 7:01 am You ay be right, as in Rebuild, I think that they are giving ALL of the angels this face, correct me if I'm wrong, but I saw that the 4th(5th in this movie) angel also had this face somewhere on it.

[]:             Quote Post by conchappie » Thu Sep 11, 2008 7:37 am yeah there's a pic of Sachiel above but not all the angles have this face eg Shamshel and Ramiel don't have that face unless it's not visible? I'm gonna post a new thread with another question concerning the angels apearances Here

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Sep 11, 2008 10:23 am Shamshel does in fact have the bony mask-face above that helmet-like canopy/shell in Rebuild; although she didn't have one in NGE. It's true that Ramiel doesn't seem to have one, though. Perhaps it's hidden somewhere inside, but as to how likely that is I can't say since she does also unfold during Rebuild and there doesn't seem to be anything inside other than more blue plating and empty space. My guess is that this mask will appear on other Angels throughout Rebuild when it CAN, i.e. not on Angels such as Arael, Armisael and Tabris (which would be more than a little awkward...imagine it), but appearing on most every Angel otherwise; that's not to say I won't be disappointed if they put a mask of that sort on Zeruel, though.

[]:             Quote Post by conchappie » Thu Sep 11, 2008 12:54 pm its interesting out of those born from Adam all have the same face just different variants. likewise those born of Lilith all have the same face as well just different variants. its amazing also how animals in the world even today mimic humans (The Dominate species) sometimes in mannerism ect. likewise the angels eventually reconise us the Lilim as the dominate species and mimic our shape and form aka Tabris animals adapt to their surroundings in order to survive and so did the angels. ultimately becoming man himself

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Sep 11, 2008 1:09 pm mimic our shape and form aka Tabris

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Sep 11, 2008 1:50 pm According to one theory, of course. I still like the idea that a Lilim-based body was queefed out of Adam thanks to AKIRA'S DONOR DNA LOL.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Thu Sep 11, 2008 4:01 pm Anyway, like AyrYntake said, I also think that the future angels in the rebuild movies will have the same 'face' as Lillith, Sachiel and Ramiel. Maybe Shamshell wasn't given one, as there was no real place to put it or something... I don't really know about that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 11, 2008 4:10 pm The idea of Lilith's new "mask" being a face is just a theory at this point; although it's one I personally like.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 11, 2008 6:30 pm AuraTwilight wrote: According to one theory, of course. I still like the idea that a Lilim-based body was queefed out of Adam thanks to...

[]:             Quote Post by M2Dane » Wed Sep 17, 2008 4:21 pm Question. What's the deal with the scar and nails around the Spear of Longinus' point of entry? It could still be a mask because if you look you can clearly see eyes hidden behind it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 17, 2008 4:48 pm M2Dane wrote: What's the deal with the scar and nails around the Spear of Longinus' point of entry?

[]:             Quote Post by M2Dane » Wed Sep 17, 2008 5:14 pm Okay, I'm going to propose a wild theory. The fact that Lilith has Sachiel's mask is due to the close proximity of the offspring of the other SoL and the Lilith's souless body is being affected by the angel's AT Field which is what gives everything it's form. It's been a while since I've watched Rebuild so my memory is a little foggy, I'll watch it again tonight when I get back from school. It's just a theory, what do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Sep 17, 2008 5:21 pm @Reichu's posted pics: That is absolutely fascinating, I forgot about those screens. I now agree that the mask is a face and not a mask. @M2Dane: Pretty wild, but I'm not buying it.

[]:             Quote Post by M2Dane » Wed Sep 17, 2008 5:31 pm I told you it was wild, unfortunately with only Rebuild 1 to base it upon, I lack anything that I could possibly back it up with. I'm still not sold that it a real face though.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Sep 17, 2008 11:18 pm The idea is baseless. The proximity of a being can't control someone else's AT Field, which Lilith wouldn't even have because Rei has her soul. Lilith and other Angelic entities are made of Particle-Wave Matter, and they do not require an AT Field to maintain their shape.

[]:             Quote Post by M2Dane » Wed Sep 17, 2008 11:46 pm It's exactly the fact the Lilith's body doesn't have an AT Field at the moment that made me think of the possibility. Since Lilith has no soul in her body she's basically a blank slate with no defined form and since the angel's AT Fields are inherently more powerful than ours, the soulless AT Field-less Lilith body would begin to uncontrollably show the influence of an outside AT Field. Just curious, where does it say that the angel's don't need an AT field to maintain their form I thought that was one of the properties of an AT Field (especially considering that Lilin have been called the 18th Angel and that's what their AT Fields are for), I must have missed it somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Sep 18, 2008 2:11 am Since Lilith has no soul in her body she's basically a blank slate with no defined form and since the angel's AT Fields are inherently more powerful than ours, the soulless AT Field-less Lilith body would begin to uncontrollably show the influence of an outside AT Field.

[]:             Quote Post by M2Dane » Thu Sep 18, 2008 6:45 am In that same note though, when human's die their soul supposedly leaves us but they don't resort back to LCL when that happens either, so I can't buy that theory entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 18, 2008 6:48 am M2Dane: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=5200 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=5284 Topic.
